text.message: Can one of you plow with help?
But, that's the best middle spot for red
Cracked, gives me the road player a chance to catch up
You’re on 16 pips of wood production lol
Haha, it's like black forest mode XD
Giving blue this set up was outrageous haha
Loaded board, lots of good setups tho
You got lucky cause of the in-house fighting tho
Shame that’s how the game got dictated
But at least red started semi trying towards the back end
If they took 9,4,11 I think they actually win
what r u guys talking about I robbed black like one time
just to get my brick back
And didn’t plow blue when you had it
I was on the 8 ore lol
You gave him god gear set up
he robbed me ii robbed him he solod me
yes it was I just checked dude
bet black got robbed once all game
When blue was clearly the leader
Yeah but you did it cause you were mad at black. No way you thought I was infront right?
Just a terrible read by you then. That’s all g
Lol, I thought u were ahead at that time too
